item.title: She Kept Pushing The Swing While Her Son Was Gone

item.title: She Went on TV After Taking Her Toddler's LIFE!
item.description: Emma Kenny discusses a tragic case involving a toddler, focusing on the TV appearance and the surrounding circumstances.
